description: Master the art of poaching eggs and fish for delicate dishes.

steps.instruction: Bring a pot of water to a gentle simmer.
Add a splash of vinegar to help the egg whites coagulate.
Crack the egg into a small bowl and gently slide it into the water.
Cook until the whites are set but the yolk is still runny.

safety_tips: Use a slotted spoon to remove poached items from hot water.
Be careful of steam when lifting the lid.
